SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-05-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Richard Fong, Jr. Esq.510-748-6800 x103 for Appellant, Saddleback HOA
Andrew S. Cantor, Esq. 415-817-1708 for Respondents, Orette Patrick and Eric Broderick,

This cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn

Andrew Cantor gives opening statements on behalf of Respondent/Plaintiff Eric Broderick and Orette Patrick.

The Court accepts Plaintiff/Respondent exhibits
The Court poses questions to both counsel.
The Court hears from Richard Fong, Jr.

The Court hears testimony from witnesses Orette Patrick and Eric Broderick.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission

Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: R. Goulding
